Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x098B "ACE2-098B" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "ACE 2.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The value stored at $098A was changed from $03 to $00 to remove the manual protection.
